# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
  - name: vmName
    type: string
    displayName: VM Name
  - name: image
    type: string
    displayName: VM Image
  - name: size
    type: string
    displayName: VM Size

resources:
  - name: publicIP
    type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    location: eastus
    properties:
      allocationMethod: Static

  - name: vm
    type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    location: eastus
    dependsOn:
      - publicIP
    properties:
      image:
        publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
        offer: WindowsServer
        sku: 2022-Datacenter-Gen2
        version: latest
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - name: nic
            properties:
              ipConfigurations:
                - name: ipConfig
                  properties:
                    privateIPAddress: 10.0.0.4
                    publicIPAddress:
                      reference:
                        name: publicIP
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_DS1_v2

outputs:
  - name: vmName
    value: $(vm.name)
  - name: publicIPAddress
    value: $(publicIP.ipAddress)
